title: Facilities Officer
description:
You will be required to perform administrative duties such as facilities booking, managing office stationaries and inventories, ensuring proper documentations and records. Furthermore, you will attend to residents' feedbacks and enquiries.

At least 1 year of relevant customer service and administrative experience

Pleasant with a customer-oriented mindset

postedCompany.description:
Incorporated in 2009, SECURUS embraces a holistic approach to security, incorporating physical guarding, remote monitoring, event security, in house training and security consultancy service for private entities. Within 6 years, SECURUS had achieved a grading of S9 in EPPU, this had further advanced our reach to both Government and private entities in Singapore.


Focusing on the training competency and operational capability, SECURUS ties up with relevant Government agencies to bolster Government efforts to train and better equip security staff. In 2011, SECURUS was granted ATO status and achieved ISO 9000 Status and Biz SAFE Level 4.


SECURUS has been actively working on the ideology that security could be better achieved through technology. SECURUS’s inauguration was with the primary aim to solve the high expectation for increased security in Singapore and had been continually searching for new technology to cater to the increased demand for innovative and advanced solutions. With each project having its intricacies, SECURUS can fully engage them, as well as providing viable solutions to complex situations for service excellence. This commitment had again garnered an ‘A’ grading in 2021 by the Singapore Police Force including a proud recipient of several SSI awards in the same year.


SECURUS currently has more than 200 employees coming from Singapore. The management team comprises ex officers from the Police Force and Army. With the great deficiency in security manpower and increasing workloads among staff, productive management hierarchy is much needed today. From the Director, Service Quality Manager, Operations Manager to the Executives, they are responsible and committed to foster teamwork and promote esprit de corps. SECURUS looks after its employees from in house training, to well-designed, professionally executed training programs which help to produce knowledgeable and motivated employees which results in higher standards of performance.


One project - many forms of methodology. SECURUS provides the client with the most comprehensive and reasonable solution and its competitive advantage of SECURUS lies in its professional excellence. SECURUS will endeavour to be the security partner of your choice.
postedCompany.name: SECURUS PTE. LTD.
